notes: v3.0.12 — Hebrew dictionary expanded 49K → 125K (Wikipedia + Wiktionary + curated, CC BY-SA attribution): פריקשן, מרקטינג, פיצ'ר, אטריביושן, תתאם, אונליין and 200+ more now in dict; apostrophe normalization fixed (פיצ'ר no longer corrupts to פיץ'ר); Smart Pending First Word unified across all early-return paths; Shift+digit correctly captures shifted symbols; My Words triple-bug fixed (auto-lang detect + DB read + UI badge); recording pill height 38→28 + 'Dictating…' renamed; onboarding privacy disclosure added.
